chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-1959 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on Misc. No.5490/2025 2. For order on Nazir’s report dated 27.9.2022 3. For order on Misc. No.24828/2022 4. For hearing of Misc. No.11232/2022 5. For hearing of Misc. No.8863/2023 6. For hearing of main case 07.11.2025 Ms. Humaira Jatoi advocate for SBCA Mr. Asmatullah Memon advocate for respondent Nos.3 to 8 -------------------------------- None present for the petitioners without intimation. According to learned counsel for the Sindh Building Control Authority (SBCA) there is no violation of the building plan on the part of the petitioners. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed. The petitioners, if so advised, may approach the SBCA through the Smart Complaint Redressal Mechanism (SCRM), if they have any further grievance, which will be decided by the SBCA in accordance with its SOPs. Petition stands disposed of alongwith listed / pending applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
